stemHtml:
On the 4th February at 08:00 Standard Time A STA an aircraft is exactly above position A. Given the following information, estimate the time and date of arrival at position B in Standard Time B STB

Position A: 50°00.0’N, 138°30.0’W STA: UTC -9 hours
Position B: 50°00.0’N, 175°45.0’ E STB: UTC +12 hours
Ground distance between A and B: 1736 NM
Air distance between A and B exactly when the aircraft arrives over position B: 1636 NM
Average tailwind component for the flight: 25 kt
